title: PackagedDraconic
description: Draconic Evolution Fusion Autocrafting with PackagedAuto
body:
PackagedDraconic is an addon to PackagedAuto and Draconic Evolution, and it adds the ability to automatically craft items made using Draconic Evolution's Fusion Crafting Core more easily. This mod is designed to be able to run without Applied Energistics 2, but installation with it is recommended.

This mod adds the Fusion Package Crafter. To use it, put one next to an Unpackager, and have the Unpackager handle the crafting recipes, which can be encoded into recipe holders with the Encoder. The crafter requires a sufficient amount of Marked Fusion Crafting Injectors with tiers that fulfill the recipe requirement. The crafter, when connected to a ME Network, will automatically eject outputs into the network.
